Load Data


QQ Plots for each treatment 

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
par(mfrow=c(1,3))
qqnorm(isoflurane, main="Isoflurane QQ Plot"); qqline(isoflurane)
qqnorm(halothane, main="Halothane QQ Plot"); qqline(halothane)
qqnorm(cyclopropane, main="Cyclopropane QQ Plot"); qqline(cyclopropane)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](hwnov19_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-1-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


Boxplots


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
boxplot(concentration ~ treatment, data=df_long,
        main="Boxplots of Epinephrine Levels by Treatment",
        ylab="Concentration (ng/mL)")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](hwnov19_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


Parametic analysis 

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
aov_model <- aov(concentration ~ treatment + Error(dog/treatment), data=df_long)
summary(aov_model)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Error: dog
          Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)
Residuals  9 0.5169 0.05744               

Error: dog:treatment
          Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
treatment  2  1.081  0.5404   4.406 0.0277 *
Residuals 18  2.208  0.1227                 
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
friedman.test(as.matrix(df[,2:4]))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

	Friedman rank sum test

data:  as.matrix(df[, 2:4])
Friedman chi-squared = 1.4, df = 2, p-value = 0.4966
```


:::
:::

ANS:
that at least one of the anesthetics has a significantly different effect on plasma epinephrine concentration.
